original_prompt: Update VansView to restrict van assignments to a single technician via the UI, and update AppointmentsView booking modal to dynamically display the assigned technician's name when a service location is selected.
rephrased_goal: Enforce 1:1 Van-to-Technician assignment in the UI while preserving the list-based DB schema, and enhance dispatcher visibility in the booking modal by explicitly showing the assigned technician's name when a van coverage area is hit.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Refactor Van Technician Assignment to Single Select
subtasks_required: 1.2 Replace tech checkboxes with <select> in add/edit modals
1.3 Update form data extraction to wrap single tech ID in array [id]
tasks.testing_criteria: Vans UI only allows selecting one tech; DB still receives array.

subtasks_required: 2.1 Test add van with selected tech
2.2 Test edit van with selected tech
2.3 Inspect Firestore payload to ensure assigned_users is [tech_id]
tasks.analogy_reference: poking the assignment to see if it holds
tasks.testing_criteria: Van assignment persistence works as expected.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Enhance Tech Visibility in Appointment Booking
subtasks_required: 3.2 Modify updateTechOptions to resolve assigned tech name from userDataArray
3.3 Update #location-status UI with Van ID and Tech Name
tasks.analogy_reference: naming the scout when they find the trail
tasks.testing_criteria: Booking modal displays 'Covered by VAN-XXX (Assigned PS: Name)'.

subtasks_required: 4.3 Confirm status text shows correct Van and Tech name
tasks.analogy_reference: looking with eagle eye at the map info
tasks.testing_criteria: Visibility text is accurate and readable.

subtasks_required: Ensure no breakage in existing travel/validation logic
tasks.testing_criteria: System is robust and meets all requirements.
